name: Risk Sentinel — ACLED Conflict Events Ingestion

nodes.name: Schedule (Every 6h)
nodes.notes: ACLED data updates daily; polling every 6h ensures freshness without excess API calls

nodes.name: ACLED — Conflict Events (30d)
nodes.notes: Fetches last 30 days of armed conflict events from ACLED. Requires ACLED API credentials configured in n8n (Header Auth with Bearer token).

nodes.name: Process Conflicts & Trade Impact
nodes.notes: Maps ACLED events to trade chokepoint proximity and computes severity scores
